evals.name: pipia-trigger-analysis
evals.prompt: 我公司正在开发一款移动健康APP，收集用户身高、体重、血压、血糖数据，并提供健康建议。请问我们需要做PIPIA吗？请给出法律依据分析。
evals.expected_output: 分析PIPL第55条触发条件，确定健康数据是否属于敏感PI（医疗健康类别），引用PIPL第28条敏感PI定义，给出明确结论及法律依据

assertions.name: cites_pipl_article_55
assertions.description: Must cite PIPL Article 55 for PIPIA trigger conditions
assertions.check: Output contains reference to 第五十五条 or Article 55 of PIPL

assertions.name: cites_pipl_article_28
assertions.description: Must cite PIPL Article 28 for sensitive PI definition since health data is involved
assertions.check: Output contains reference to 第二十八条 or Article 28, and quotes the definition of sensitive PI including 医疗健康

assertions.name: quotes_original_text
assertions.description: Must quote original Chinese statutory text, not just summarize
assertions.check: Output contains direct quotes in Chinese from PIPL articles, using quote marks or quote blocks

assertions.name: clear_conclusion
assertions.description: Must provide clear yes/no conclusion with legal reasoning
assertions.check: Output states clear conclusion about whether PIPIA is required, with reasoning chain

evals.name: cross-border-pathway
evals.prompt: 我公司是上海一家电商企业（非CIIO），需要将用户订单数据（含姓名、地址、电话）传输给新加坡仓储合作伙伴。自今年1月起累计传输约50万用户数据。请分析适用哪种跨境传输路径。
evals.expected_output: 按促进和规范数据跨境流动规定第5-8条分析跨境路径，判定是否适用安全评估/标准合同/认证/豁免，给出数据量计算和路径结论

assertions.name: cites_cross_border_regulation
assertions.description: Must cite 促进和规范数据跨境流动规定 Article 5-8
assertions.check: Output cites 促进和规范数据跨境流动规定 第五条/第七条/第八条

assertions.name: calculates_data_volume
assertions.description: Must calculate and state data volume against thresholds
assertions.check: Output clearly states 50万 users and compares against 10万/100万 thresholds

assertions.name: determines_pathway
assertions.description: Must determine correct pathway (标准合同 based on 10万-100万 range for non-CIIO)
assertions.check: Output correctly identifies 标准合同 pathway for non-CIIO with 50万 PI (between 10万-100万)

assertions.name: mentions_pipia_requirement
assertions.description: Must mention PIPIA requirement before cross-border transfer
assertions.check: Output mentions PIPIA requirement per PIPL Article 55 or cross-border regulations

evals.name: pipia-report-drafting
evals.prompt: 请为我公司的人脸识别门禁系统起草一份PIPIA报告。系统收集员工面部特征用于办公楼门禁通行，涉及约2000名员工。
evals.expected_output: 按GB/T 39335-2020模板起草PIPIA报告，包含11个章节，识别人脸为敏感PI（生物识别），引用PIPL第28、55、56条，完成风险分析

assertions.name: uses_correct_template
assertions.description: Must follow GB/T 39335-2020 report structure with 11 sections
assertions.check: Output contains sections matching template: 基本信息、评估对象描述、数据映射分析、合规性分析、风险源识别、个人权益影响分析、安全风险综合分析、保护措施有效性分析、风险处置建议、评估结论、附录

assertions.name: identifies_face_as_sensitive_pi
assertions.description: Must correctly identify facial recognition data as sensitive PI (生物识别)
assertions.check: Output identifies 面部特征/人脸识别 as sensitive PI citing PIPL Article 28 生物识别 category

assertions.name: cites_gbt_39335
assertions.check: Output cites GB/T 39335-2020 for methodology (第5.4条、第5.5条、附录D etc.)

assertions.name: includes_risk_level_determination
assertions.description: Must determine risk level using GB/T 39335-2020 Appendix D methodology
assertions.check: Output includes risk level determination (可能性、影响程度、风险等级) citing 附录D

assertions.name: quotes_legal_text
assertions.description: Every legal requirement analysis must quote original statutory text
assertions.check: For each legal citation, original Chinese text is quoted (not just summarized)
